card_description: Vernadsky and Teilhard's concept of a planetary sphere of thought; PKD saw it as the informational substrate of consciousness.
full_description:
Vernadsky and Teilhard's concept of a planetary sphere of thought; PKD saw it as the informational substrate of consciousness.

**Category:** Information Metaphysics

**Key segment contexts:**
- (September 15, 1975) Dick explores the "Rome Two" superimposition theory, identifying the Nixon administration as the return of the Roman Empire and the fall of Nixon as a true historical victory for Christ. He introdu...
- (September 15, 1976) Dick theorizes that the return of St. Sophia manifests as a "network" of individuals acting on divine impulse. He connects the Parousia to a "Time Reversal" (the Hobart Effect) where entropic time ...
- (September 15, 1976) Dick identifies Zebra with the Noosphere (Teilhard de Chardin) and proposes that this "Collective Mind" (Corpus Christi) is building itself *backward* in time from the Omega Point. 3-74 was his own...
